history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly ahead at D06 is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The cell to the left (C07) is a wall, and the cell to the right (E07) is a safe floor. Turning right will allow me to move east toward the goal at F05.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (row 06, column D) is a floor cell (`.`), which is safe to step onto. The goal is visible at row 05 column B. I can proceed forward to row 06 column D, then later turn left and continue toward the goal. No immediate danger is present, so moving forward is the best action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 6, column B. I am at row 7, column D, facing up. The cell directly ahead (row 6, column D) is an empty floor. Moving forward is safe and will bring me closer to the goal. From there, I can later turn left to reach the goal without stepping on the lava at (7,C).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07, column D, facing up. Directly in front of me is a wall (#) at row 06, column D. The goal (G) is at row 07, column B, to my left. The cell between me and the goal is a safe floor (.) at column C. To reach the goal, I need to turn left to face west, then move forward. There is no lava in sight.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05, column D, directly ahead. The cell immediately in front (06, D) is a safe floor cell. There is no lava or wall blocking the path. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 06, column D. It is safe to move forward, as there is no wall or lava in that cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
